graphNodes.label: .fallowrc.json
graphNodes.description: Fallow dead-code analyzer configuration. Defines entry points (src/index.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}, src/main.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}), duplicate detection thresholds (minOccurrences: 3), rules (unused-dependencies: warn), and ignoreExports for Svelte components and constants that are intentionally exported for framework consumption.

graphNodes.label: AGENTS.md
graphNodes.description: Instructions for AI agents working on this codebase. Mandates using Context7 for library documentation and consulting official docs for Svelte, SvelteKit, TypeScript, Drizzle, Better Auth, Vite, Tailwind, and Vitest.

graphNodes.label: README.md
graphNodes.description: Project README based on the Svelte + TypeScript + Vite template. Covers IDE setup, SvelteKit comparison, technical considerations for HMR, allowJs, and TypeScript configuration choices.

graphNodes.label: fallow-output.json
graphNodes.description: Fallow dead-code analysis results (v2.102.0). Reports 28 total issues: 1 unused file, 23 unused exports, 2 unused types, 2 duplicate exports. Includes detailed per-file findings with evidence and line references for unused symbols across the codebase.

graphNodes.label: fallow-security.json
graphNodes.description: Fallow security analysis results (v2.102.0). Contains security findings including tainted-sink vulnerabilities (CWE-79 dangerous-html in DidYouMean.svelte) and other security patterns. Includes attack surface analysis and unresolved edge/callee diagnostics.

graphNodes.label: index.html
graphNodes.description: SPA entry point HTML. Sets up the root #app div and loads /src/main.ts as a module script. Title is 'VoxlBlade Builder'.

graphNodes.label: package.json
graphNodes.description: npm package manifest for 'voxlblade' (private, v0.0.0, ESM). Scripts: dev, build, preview, check. DevDependencies: Svelte 5.55, Vite 8, TypeScript 6, Playwright, ESLint, fallow, svelte-check, vite-plugin-pwa. Dependencies: @vercel/analytics.

graphNodes.label: tsconfig.app.json
graphNodes.description: TypeScript configuration for the Svelte application. Extends @tsconfig/svelte. Targets ES2023, uses ESNext modules, enables allowJs/checkJs, includes src/**/*.{ts,js,svelte}.

graphNodes.label: tsconfig.json
graphNodes.description: Root TypeScript configuration. Simply extends tsconfig.app.json.

graphNodes.label: tsconfig.node.json
graphNodes.description: TypeScript configuration for Node-side files (vite.config.ts). Targets ES2023 with bundler module resolution, enables strict linting (noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters), includes only vite.config.ts.

graphNodes.label: vercel.json
graphNodes.description: Vercel deployment configuration. Build command: npm run build, output: dist, framework: vite. Sets cache headers: immutable long-cache for /assets/*, no-cache for /sw.js and /index.html.

graphNodes.label: Fallow
graphNodes.description: Dead-code and security analysis tool (v2.102.0) used for static analysis of the codebase.

graphNodes.label: TypeScript
graphNodes.description: TypeScript compiler (v6.0.2) used for type checking.

graphNodes.label: Vercel
graphNodes.description: Vercel hosting platform used for deploying the built SPA.

graphEdges.label: SPA entry point loads src/main.ts defined by package
